scripts.dev: concurrently --names user,task,calendar,notif,ai,gateway --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red "pnpm --filter @lastminute/user-service dev" "pnpm --filter @lastminute/task-service dev" "pnpm --filter @lastminute/calendar-service dev" "pnpm --filter @lastminute/notification-service dev" "pnpm --filter @lastminute/ai-service dev" "pnpm --filter @lastminute/api-gateway dev"
